---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

Describe the problem you're trying to solve. What does Crucible's current
behavior force you to work around?

## Proposed solution

What would you like Crucible to do? If you have a sketch of the API or UX,
include it.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed and why you rejected them. Helps maintainers
understand the design space.

## Scope

- [ ] This is a small change (single file or two, a few hundred LOC).
- [ ] This is a medium change (a new module, ~1k LOC, no breaking API).
- [ ] This is a large change (architectural, breaking, multi-PR).

For medium and large, expect a design discussion in the issue before
code lands.

## Roadmap fit

Does this match an item in [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md)? If not, why
should it be prioritized over what's already on the roadmap?
